---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that isn't working correctly
title: "Bug: "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. See the error

## Expected Behavior

What should happen instead.

## Screenshots / Video

If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording (especially for mobile UI bugs).

## Device Info

- **Device:** (e.g., iPhone 15, Pixel 8)
- **OS:** (e.g., iOS 18, Android 15)
- **Browser:** (e.g., Safari, Chrome)

## Additional Context

Any other details — does it happen every time? Only in certain game modes?
